2303630.name: Saint Warner's Angels
2303630.description:
Saint Warner's Angels is an action packed coming-of-age story of enormous proportions.
Experience the gripping epic of Mya Oakley in a retro-pixel world accompanied with cutscenes that are brought to life with hand-drawn illustrations and animations.



Welcome to 1985! Since you'll be living in Warner's Pass in the great Lone Star State, let's take a little tour. Would you like to admire the mayor’s house and marvel at how rich he is compared to the rest of the town? Or maybe visit the trailer park; if you are lucky enough you won’t get hit with a flung beer bottle as you pass by the Reagan ‘88 sign.

If you're strapped for cash, you can pick up odd jobs, diner shifts, or even requests on your local job board.

When you're not doing that, you will join in the fight against the growing threat of a Cryptid invasion though gorgeously hand drawn turn based battles. To pose a real threat, timing your attacks through action commands will surely give those monsters a run for their money.

Team up with up to 2 party members that make up Mya’s brother and her friends. And when the battles get rough and your energy surges, unleash your group’s fury through Special Attacks and Duo Special Attacks: animated assaults of multiple characters combining their strengths to leave their enemies devastated. Push back against the impossible odds along side the people who have always been by your side.
